prompt: create a mental health journaling app with soft pastel color palette, hand-drawn style icons, organic mood tracking visualizations, encouraging typography, and gentle gradient backgrounds
prompt_refined: Generate a full-screen UI design for a mobile mental health journaling application. The interface should feature a soft pastel color palette throughout, complemented by hand-drawn style icons. Incorporate organic, flowing shapes and abstract visualizations for mood tracking. Use encouraging, legible typography, and ensure backgrounds are subtle, gentle gradients.
objects: Mobile mental health journaling application UI
